title: Celestial Butterfly HQ
desc: Embark on an enchanting journey into the world of butterflies! Equip your net and nectars to hunt in various locations. Catch over 600 butterflies to expand your collection. Earn XP to level up and unlock better gear. Grow flowers for nectars, craft potions, and sell your creations. Explore this magical world, have fun, and earn Lindens!

title: Strays And Misfits
desc: Strays And Misfits is a photogenic park and beach with activities for all. Use the teleporters to head to the beach, paintball park, photo booths, fishing pond, beach cafe, and art gallery, or just wander around taking pics and soaking in the sun and peaceful atmosphere. Feel free to engage with the locals around the bonfire and enjoy your stay!

title: Cave in Korea City
desc: Welcome to the hidden underwater cave in Korea City. This mysterious underwater cave is perfect for an intimate date and exploration. Feel the wonders of nature in the calm, beautiful cave. Create unforgettable moments. Enjoy simple camping, connecting with nature and its tranquility.

title: Calas Galadhon
desc: Escape to the vast estate and nature park of Calas Galadhon, a peaceful, romantic place to enjoy the beauty of the natural world brought into Second Life. Explore by horse, buggy, boat or balloon.

title: Somewhere Between Sleeping and Waking sXAJIWxf
desc: A work in progress, evolving and changing just like the seasons, meant to be a creative outlet to build and share something with others, a quiet, reflective place. Wander through the woods, find a quiet spot, and enjoy with a friend.

title: Lost Unicorn
desc: A dreamy, beautiful and mystical Elven realm shrouded in mist and magic. The forest is home to fairies, centaurs, unicorns, and much abundant wildlife. Grab your loved ones for a stroll, explore to your heart's content, or bring your camera to take stunning pictures. The numerous hidden spots are also perfect for relaxing. Can you find them all?

title: Chess Nebula
desc: Chess Nebula is a welcoming forest destination centered around the game of chess. Visitors can play matches in a calm, friendly setting suited for both beginners and experienced players. It offers a relaxed space to learn, practice, and enjoy the game among others who share the same interest.

title: Ancient Order of Centaurs
desc: The Ancient Order of Centaurs is a beautiful, and varied region where centaurs and their friends can feel at home. Visitors are very welcome, whether they are centaurs, creatures, and even hoomans. Come explore, join the community, or just take photos of the lovely scenery.

title: The Theater at LeLoo's World Mainland
desc: As the season warms, step into a sunlit world where fantasy blooms across the land. Follow the winding path to a charming open‑air theater, or wander down to the Lake to enjoy rideable swans and delightful pose props—perfect for capturing memories touched with a hint of magic. Please use the following settings for the best viewer experience: use Shared Environment for both Sky & Water, check the box for Transparent Water, turn on sounds, and set the draw distance to 150+. Everyone is welcome to this PG event! Don't forget to share your photos in the Flickr group: flickr.com/groups/leloosworld

title: Puffball Park
desc: Puffball Park is a family-friendly roleplaying destination where Residents can socialize and play. The park features a playground, seating for singles and couples, a beach, and open water areas with boat rezzing. All brands of babies, including Zooby, are welcome, and the park supports MyStory and various family roleplaying activities.

title: L'aEvo
desc: L'aEvo is a quiet garden retreat set among trees and gentle paths. Visitors can relax by the water, gather around a fire pit, or enjoy game tables for casual play and conversation. The space invites small groups seeking calm, connection, and a romantic outdoor setting.

title: Luanes World - Le Monde Perdu - Spring
desc: Step into a world of soft sunlight, blooming trees, and gentle waters. This spring paradise is perfect for beautiful photos, romantic moments, and peaceful exploration. Wander along charming little streams, discover quiet lakes hidden between flowers and greenery, and find cozy spots made for relaxing and cuddling. Whether you’re here to capture magical pictures, share a sweet moment with someone special, or simply unwind in nature’s beauty, this destination is your perfect spring escape!

title: Gaeta Civic Garden
desc: Gaeta Civic Garden is a formal public landscape inspired by classical Greek ideals. Centered on a temple, gazebo, and elevated gloriette, it offers a place for gathering, reflection, and civic ceremony—where architecture, greenery, and open space meet in quiet harmony.

title: Serene Elements
desc: Serene Elements brings the magic of a full family resort: camping adventures, fun activities, horseback riding, paintball, bumper cars, live concerts, rentals for every outing, a warm waffle house, and a lively roller‑rink studio.

title: The Elvenwood
desc: Wander amongst the trees and be surprised at the delights of the Fairytale Forest (can you find the hidden treasure chest?) Discover the Ballroom of the Mermaids and walk with trepidation through the Dark Wood. Travel to distant Asia to the island of Enoshima or back in time to the classical world of Delfai (and have your prophecy read by the Oracle). And mostly come for peace and tranquility.

title: Ariadne Zoo
desc: Ariadne Zoo is the largest Zoo in Second Life, consisting of 2 beautifully landscaped regions. Completely rebuilt in 2020 to include a Savannah experience, a Herbarium, children playgrounds, Lovers Lane and of course: all the animals you can think of. Grab a picnic-basket and bring the whole family!

title: Illustria Rainforest Resort
desc: Discover two expansive regions filled with vibrant trails and lush jungle. Engage in activities such as zip-lining and high diving, or opt for a more leisurely pace with serene raft tours and kayaking. For those seeking relaxation, tranquil areas provide the perfect escape. To elevate your experience, consider renting a furnished cabana that offers stunning views and the calming sounds of the rainforest.

title: Isola Sirena
desc: Isola Sirena is a two‑region Italian coastal village offering sweeping hillside views, romantic waterfront scenery, and the charm of a Mediterranean getaway. Visitors can enjoy an upscale restaurant overlooking the sea, a cozy café in the village piazza, and leisurely gondola tours through scenic canals. Horse‑and‑carriage rides wind through cobblestone streets, while a lively farmers market, hillside winery, mini golf, and many other amenities create a rich, immersive experience. Designed for exploration, photography, and relaxation, Isola Sirena brings the warmth and beauty of Italy to life in Second Life.

title: Evergarden Equestrian Oaks
desc: Spring has cast its spell, covering the Evergarden Oaks region in a tapestry of lush greens and vibrant wildflowers. As the season unfolds, horses graze peacefully across expansive pastures, creating a picturesque scene straight from a horse lover's dream. In this unique community, they prioritize the well-being of their equine companions and love of nature above all else.

title: Shropshire Rolling Hills Farm
desc: Welcome to the Rolling Hills of Shropshire England! Whether it be for fishing, camping, Horse Role playing, or homes to rent, everyone is welcome. Come and enjoy a beautiful experience!

title: The Nature Collective In Bloom
desc: This spring, The Nature Collective returns to its roots with a more immersive, nature-focused experience. TNC: In Bloom invites visitors to slow down, wander, and reconnect with nature in Second Life. Visit the greenhouse for TNC info and Travelogue: In Bloom, then follow the garden path to discover featured locations, iNaturalist info, interactive painting, and photo spots, including a butterfly wing wall. It's a peaceful space to explore, relax, and get lost in the spring flowers.

title: Le'eaf Forest Retreat
desc: In the heart of a timeless forest, the Le'eaf Forest Retreat stands where raindrops compose a symphony upon emerald leaves. Once a bustling train depot, it’s now a cozy café reclaimed by Mother Nature. Vines weave through weathered beams, crafting a tranquil sanctuary. Step inside, escape the ceaseless rain, and find solace where nature and nostalgia blend seamlessly. https://tinyurl.com/leafbean

title: Lost Lagoon
desc: Lost Lagoon is an isolated paradise in the South Seas. This beautiful jewel of a destination is a great place to explore, get in touch with nature, relax and cuddle. Everyone is welcome to find their piece of paradise at the Lost Lagoon.

title: Armenelos
desc: Armenelos is an engaging woodland region in the vast Calas Galadhon Park estate. With all the pristine woodlands, coastal wildlife, and steep cliffs, one can't help but feel inspired to explore.

title: Amazon River
desc: This wet jungle is home to hundreds of different plants and animals; some of these are venomous or poisonous. Some species of large predators make their home here. The tallest trees are around 316 feet / 96 meters tall, and the overgrowth is difficult to travel through without cutting tools. Ancient temples are lost deep within them. Indigenous tribes live in the jungle. Bring friends, relax, explore, and roleplay!

title: Mimmo
desc: MIMMO is a scenic nature destination, perfect for photos and quiet exploration. Ponds, greenery, cozy homes, rain, a small city setting, and intimate cuddle spots await.

title: Everwild Aquarium & Safari Park
desc: Everwild Safari Park and Aquarium is a fun, family-friendly adventure in Second Life. Explore 10 exciting animal enclosures, 5 detailed aquarium zones, and walk through a stunning underwater shark tunnel. Enjoy the thrill of the Kraken rollercoaster, grab a bite at the food court, visit the play park and petting zoo, or relax at the Butterfly Cafe and The View Restaurant. Group access required L$500 to join. Start your adventure today.

title: The Anchor - Home of Anchorbury
desc: The Anchor is an open-air live music venue on the mainland coast of Alcis. Set among ruins, trees and water, it hosts regular Saturday events and a monthly Anchorbury festival featuring live performances and DJs on the last Saturday of the month. The land is designed for exploration, with the Atoll Coastal Walkway situated at its centre, as well as facilities for horse riding, bike riding, and hot air balloon rides.

title: Wumpkins Wood
desc: Wumpkins Wood has lovely rustic hiking trails that lead to a campfire circle and games cabin. A lush creek runs directly through the location, carving out a hollow log and emptying into a koi-stocked pond. If you're adventurous, you'll find the movie cave where you can relax with friends and watch shows together. Every other week you can enjoy hosted old-time radio shows and movie events!

title: Good Life Fun Park
desc: Dive into a world of excitement at a high-traffic main park, located upstairs. Here, you'll discover daily contests, lively events, bustling market stalls, exciting crystal hunts, and prominent ad boards. It's the perfect place for fun and making memories, with attractions, events, games, and contests galore, and also home to the Good Life Main Office.

title: Caves of the Heterocera Mountains
desc: The largest natural cave system in Second Life! Miles of caves weave through the central mountains of the Heterocera Continent. The known caves range over 4 regions. Above ground are trails and alpine terrain to explore. Be sure to tell someone where you're going and when you plan to return in case you get lost and they have to search for you!

title: Kaleidoscope - Monarch Education Project
desc: Kaleidoscope, a Monarch Education Project, brought to you by MORPH Productions and SPARK Project, is an experience for the mind, heart, and soul. Follow the nature hike to learn about the importance of this beautiful butterfly and experience the breathtaking views of the monarch wintering grounds. Immerse in the butterfly experience while cuddling your beloved.

title: Japanese Garden at Project Hope
desc: Walk and explore the Japanese Garden at Project Hope. Come and explore, sit and reflect, visit the music garden, or just enjoy the sounds of the waterfalls and feel the serenity at this inspirational garden of peace and happiness.

title: Varney Garden
desc: Varney Garden is a calm wildlife and nature spot on one of the oldest mainland regions. Located near the Luskwood, Da Haro campground and the Ivory Tower of Primitives, it features plenty of places to rest your feet, as well as 7Seas fishing.

title: Roscommon Ridge
desc: Located on the northwest flanks of Mount Campion the highest mountain in SL, Roscommon Ridge is an annex of Mount Campion National Forest. Containing over 37,000 sq meters of gorgeous alpine garden of trails, canyons, forest, rivers, waterfalls and caves. Well suited for horseback riding and photography. Come and explore!

title: Mount Campion Nature Center
desc: The Nature Center at Mt. Campion National Forest is loaded with educational displays and park information. The park now has over two full regions of trails, mountains, forests, and caves. Mt. Campion is the highest mountain in mainland SL! There is lots to explore, perfect for photography and horseback riding.

title: Mindful Cove
desc: Mindful Cove exists to provide both an entry point into Second Life, and an ongoing community region for newcomers and long-time residents alike, based on the core principle that SL can be an excellent place to engage in activities that support emotional and mental well-being.

title: Countryside
desc: Established in 2013, Countryside is a quiet place to enjoy the wildlife, as well as the peace and tranquility of nature. Escape your physical world stresses and relax in this beautiful retreat, which is dedicated to Second Life photographers.

title: TheNest - Sunbird Emberwood
desc: Welcome to TheNest Sunbird Emberwood, a quiet forest village where time slows and a hint of magic lingers. Wander freely, lose yourself among the trees, and let dusk lead the way.

title: Sojourn Spring
desc: Escape into a breathtaking spring landscape perfect for unwinding and capturing stunning photos. Frame your shots with gentle flowing streams, vibrant wildflowers, and charming wildlife as your backdrop. Region Windlight settings shine here for that magical glow. [Valium] group members can rez poses. Kindly limit to 2 prims max—let's keep the serenity for everyone. Come create your masterpiece! Region designed and decorated by Terry Fotherington for Vally Lavender.

title: Beaver Creek National Park hpVKiLOS
desc: Beaver Creek National Park is a fictional Canadian-themed National Park in Second Life, offering dirt roads, paths, and water features to explore.

title: The Great Mother
desc: Dive into the deep primordial forest, an ongoing passion project for Benny Vortex. Discover a lush, bioluminescent dreamscape of sights and sounds nestled below breathtaking floating islands under the silent gaze of a gas giant. May the spirits guide you. PBR-enabled viewers, shared environment settings, and sound/music on is recommended.

title: Fairy Tales
desc: You are invited to wander into the adventure of eternity. Let your footsteps follow the colorful sparkles leading through the magical forest, river, moon, desert, and club.

title: Lavendell Quest
desc: Lavendell Quest hosts the region quest for this year’s Fantasy Faire 2025, which was on the region of Lavendell. The Quest was auctioned in the live auction at the Faire and was won with a donation of L$160,000 and then moved to a new region, “Lavendell Quest”. Find healing plants, mushrooms, and animals, and you’ll make produce, tools, and rituals that will not only be fun but educational and therapeutic. This quest has a moving conclusion that will stay with you in your heart with a dose of love and hope.

title: Wisdom Grove
desc: Explore a Buddhist park, under the benign gaze of Guanyin, across from the Buddha Centre (SL's active dharma teaching centre), including a Tibetan temple, Zen meditation retreat, stupa, Tai Chi, Tara, and a long forgotten place of dark mysteries, "by the old oak tree."

title: Reality Escape
desc: Reality Escape - books, coffee, and chairs welcomes you with a quiet invitation to come take your seat on the chair arch, to meander the hidden groves, explore the little nooks and crannies for photography, and the scenes set up to relax with friends.

title: Luminara
desc: Luminara is a space created with care, where every detail holds a deeper meaning if you’re open to it. You’ll find mirrors, keys, and other interactive elements designed to spark reflection; alongside peaceful surroundings meant to calm the mind. Whether you uncover deeper insights or simply enjoy the beauty of nature, may your time here feel meaningful in its own way.

title: Loktak Lake
desc: Loktak Lake is a large, freshwater lake located in the Northeast of India. It is known for its unique floating islands, called phumdis, which are made up of soil, vegetation, and organic matter. Stay around for a while, you'll be immersed into weather phenomena you've never seen or heard in Second Life before!

title: Arvor La Cote Sauvage
desc: Arvor La Cote Sauvage is a peaceful and quiet destination where nature is a priority. Visitors can relax as they stroll through the forest, come across a variety of wildlife, and enjoy photogenic areas with the peaceful sounds of nature. Enjoy your stay!

title: Cerulean Township
desc: Nestled in a forest where sunlight filters through evergreens and cedar scents linger, Cerulean Township offers a retreat from the world’s bustle. Meandering paths lead to places like the Les Bean Coffeehouse, Sonder Books, stables, and tranquil docks. Gather beneath the stars at the outdoor cinema, explore charming shops, or paddle across still waters. Cerulean is more than a place, it’s a feeling of belonging, where time slows, community thrives, and nature leads the way.

title: Home Sweet Home for Horse Lovers
desc: Home Sweet Home for Horse Lovers is a peaceful countryside destination created for those who love horses, nature, and a warm community atmosphere. Explore scenic forest trails on horseback, enjoy rides through blooming landscapes, or take part in fun equestrian activities and community events. Visitors can relax with friends at the cozy café, wander through nature, or simply enjoy the calm beauty of the countryside. Teegle and other companions are always welcome.

title: Evergarden Equestrian - Main Stables
desc: Experience an equestrian adventure at this family-friendly horse boarding and event facility. With top-quality amenities, it’s perfect for teegle riding and roleplay. Come and immerse yourself in nature!

title: The Wylde
desc: Welcome to The Wylde. Be gentle, be kind, find peace. Come wander the forest trails, dance in the grassy meadow. Find comfy places to sit and relax, to cuddle, to chat with friends. Explore the watchtower and the observatory. Search for the magical cavern and the hidden grotto.

title: The GlastonBelli Redwood Forest
desc: The GlastonBelli Redwood Forest is a giant pine and redwood sequoia forest park. Exploration and photography are encouraged. Find the cabin of The GlastonBelli Witch and solve a mystery!

title: Tapir
desc: Jump into the adventure! Visit the Wilderness and set sail for excitement in this untamed experience.

title: Pacifique
desc: Established in 2007, Pacifique is a peaceful coastal destination where forest trails, beaches, and underwater worlds come together. Swim, scuba, or windsurf through scenic waters, explore caves and tunnels, ride dragons, or relax at the beach club with games and dancing. A nature escape made for photography, adventure, and calm moments.

title: Mount Campion Caves National Forest
desc: Mount Campion Caves National Forest is over 150,000 sq meters of beautiful parkland, landscaped to look like a natural mountain park. It has the largest natural caves and caverns. Above ground are miles of scenic trails through natural canyons and forests. There is hiking, horseback riding, camping, and photography. and cabin rentals. Located on the slopes of Mount Campion, the highest mountain in SL on the beautiful Heterocera mainland continent. You can roam for weeks!

title: Lakeside
desc: Established in 2012, Lakeside offers peace, tranquility, a lovely little piece of nature, and a place to explore and hang out for singles, couples, and friends. Come relax, chat, or simply enjoy the surroundings. Find some peace in this fast and hectic world.

title: Campwich Lodge
desc: Campwich Lodge is a public community center for the Camper Linden Homes regions. Located in a secluded rural area, this lodge has many places to hang out, relax and socialize with others. It is right across from Campwich Station, another public community area where you can rez your locomotives on the rails in designated rezz zones and drive them through the park. Sit back and enjoy the beautiful landscaping and the calming waterfalls.

title: Astoria
desc: Step into a sanctuary of stillness, where nature and serenity meet. Surrounded by gentle greenery, flowing water, and the quiet presence of stone. This peaceful retreat invites you to slow down, breathe deeply, and reconnect with yourself. Whether you seek mindful meditation, a calming yoga session, or simply a moment of silence away from the noise of daily life, this tranquil space offers the perfect escape. Come as you are. Leave renewed.

title: Cerrado Cove
desc: A new adventure awaits at Cerrado Cove in the Sailors Cove Rainforest! Discover a charming fishing village, nestled deep within a lush tropical rainforest. This quaint waterfront community offers boat slips and cozy homes for rent, perfect for those seeking a peaceful escape with a touch of wild beauty. Keep an eye out for local wildlife—including alligators—and, if you explore carefully, you might even stumble upon a hidden moonshiner’s home tucked away among the trees. Come experience the mystery, nature, and quiet charm.

title: Lakesong Meadow xIZqAecG
desc: Welcome to Lakesong Meadow, where dreams blossom, and every experience is uniquely yours! Nestled in a breathtaking landscape of serene waters, lush gardens, and tranquil beauty, Lakesong Meadow is more than a destination; it is an experience designed to inspire, nurture, and enchant. From the moment you arrive, you are embraced by an atmosphere of elegance, warmth, and timeless charm. It also offers a romantic setting for weddings, ceremonies, and romantic getaways by the water.

title: Missing Melody
desc: What is a Missing Melody? It’s that song in your head that you can’t get out, but not sure how it really goes. It’s that temptation you want to have in your life so you can fight to resist. It’s that place in your heart that is always waiting.

title: Loulou Forest
desc: Loulou Forest is a place where a stroll through nature brings the peace and tranquility you seek. The streams that flow through it will charm you and offer opportunities to sit, relax, meditate, or chat with friends.

title: Devil's Bend National Park ADNRthcG
desc: Welcome to the wide-open mountains, where you can bring your family and friends and explore the great outdoors together. Take pictures and make memories while exploring everything Mother Nature has to offer. Explore today!

title: Garden of Whimsy Spring Fantasy World
desc: Welcome to the fantasy world of the Garden of Whimsy. You start out in the Glow Caverns and wander your way into a wonderful world of deep forests, flower-filled meadows, a floating library, unicorns, dragons, giant bunnies, and trolls. There are also horses for riding.

title: Garden Dreams by Dream Seeker Estates
desc: Welcome to Garden Dreams by Dream Seeker Estates! Explore beautiful gardens, relaxing parks, rides, Easter egg hunts, live music, and seasonal events. Visit, explore, and discover why so many choose to make DSE their home and be part of the community!

title: LeLoo's World Blooming Bookshire
desc: Welcome to Blooming Bookshire, where spring dances through the air and beckons you to wander its blossoming paths, whether you stroll on foot or glide along in a storybook carriage. This whimsical haven overflows with lush gardens, cozy nooks, and wildflowers that spark the imagination, inviting you to slow down, breathe deeply, and let a new tale unfold with every step.

title: Falling Tide
desc: Falling Tide is a richly detailed coastal town where the sea has left its mark on every plank and sign. Weathered jetties, old shopfronts, and quiet corners along the water invite slow wandering rather than quick photo grabs. It is built as a small story world in itself, a place that feels lived in and a little bruised by time, yet still warm and welcoming. Threaded through the region is the Radio Bay Lost Playlist hunt that leads visitors through most of the build.

title: Deception
desc: Come enjoy a walk through the Redwoods of Deception. It's all about relaxing, enjoying nature, and visiting with friends. Stop by the Inn for a game of Cheesy! All are welcome. From the Inn, you can catch the Train to the Valley of Stones and visit the castle ruins.

title: Virgin Islands
desc: Suspended among the clouds, Virgin Islands invites visitors into a realm of mystery and quiet reflection. A barred gate guards long-forgotten stories, while beyond it untamed wilderness embraces an abandoned stronghold. Here, a solitary fortress lingers between decay and rebirth — a place where exploration, atmosphere, and emotion intertwine.

title: Crescent Valley
desc: Crescent Valley is an LGBTQ+ friendly nature park built for exploration. Winding paths, elevated viewpoints, and quiet natural spaces invite visitors to wander, relax, and take in the scenery at their own pace.

title: The Lost Coast clXNsrOg
desc: The Lost Coast is a wild and natural site brimming with stunning panoramic views of the surrounding nature, especially the water, and magnificent sunsets. Ideal for photographers and dreamers. If you need a place to recharge, this is the perfect spot.

title: Wild Silence
desc: Wild Silence is a natural waterside retreat where reeds, gardens, and open land surround a rustic farmhouse and a cozy greenhouse café. Paths, wildlife, and gathering spaces create a calm environment to explore, meet, and unwind.

title: Bridgewater
desc: Bridgewater offers a peaceful country landscape with sea views, rustic charm, and photo-perfect spots. Explore its historic water mill, church, cottage café, and cricket oval under wide skies. Designed for relaxed walks, storytelling, and photography, it’s a destination where details invite calm exploration.

title: Feronia
desc: One step inside and the world begins to shift. Feronia, the Gorge welcomes you with a reverent stillness, broken only by the roar of water rushing far below, carving its wild, untamed path through ancient stone. Whether it's a romantic getaway for two, a private retreat, or a group hike, Feronia is worth a visit. Relax!

title: Forest of Kahruvel
desc: Explore the Forest! Travel across six regions of woods and mysterious objects, from the eastern border of Abbotts to the start of the old Noyo Road. Discover caves, read the notes in the old outpost in Rodeo, have a picnic, or go for a hike. Part of a collaborative effort to preserve and grow a large natural area where stories may be discovered and told.

title: Lost Swamp
desc: Lost Swamp is a quiet and atmospheric destination where misty waters and whispering trees create a backdrop for reflection and photography. Visitors can explore its calm paths and find inspiration in its timeless setting.

title: The Burrow
desc: The Burrow rises above a wild countryside with crooked charm, inviting visitors to step into a world inspired by childhood stories of magic and friendship. Nestled among tall trees and winding paths, it feels like a place where beloved characters might still gather.

title: Secret Valley
desc: A wonderful place to celebrate the new spring days, offering a plethora of activities. Explore the enchanting trails and forest, discover hidden caves adorned with gems and crystals, and take a leisurely horse ride. Enjoy romantic cuddles and dancing, meditate by grand waterfalls, or practice tai chi near bubbling streams. Engage in games with friends or simply relax and immerse yourself in the beauty and splendor that Secret Valley has to offer.

title: Cerulean Lake
desc: Just beyond town, waves roll in to kiss weathered docks. Cedar drifts through cool Spring air, tinged with salt and the promise of longer light. Cerulean Lake moves at its own unhurried rhythm, wrapped in nostalgia and the rite of Spring. Set your burdens down at the dock and let the quiet welcome you home.

title: Lakeville Forest Preserve
desc: Lakeville Forest Preserve is a large nature preserve featuring extensive forests and meadows, as well as a beautiful shoreline. There are miles of trails to ride and explore. Lakeville Forest Preserve is a favorite of equestrians and photographers.

title: The Forest of Hours
desc: The Forest of Hours, located in the region Scape, features a vast forest with trails, caves, and fun things to discover. The entire area is open to the public. On the west, The Forest of Hours seamlessly connects with Cael Ystafell in the region Echo, with even more verdant woods to explore! New resident friendly!

title: Cael Ystafell
desc: Cael Ystafell, located in the region Echo, features a vast forest with trails and fun things to discover. It's also the home of Kinnaird Fiachra and Ziki Questi, and the entire area is open to the public. On the east, Cael Ystafell seamlessly connects with The Forest of Hours in the region Scape, with even more verdant woods (and caves) to explore! New resident friendly!

title: Sawrey Forest
desc: Welcome to Sawrey Forest! This mystical woodland invites you to embark on enchanting walks through its extensive trails. Discover secluded spots perfect for cuddling with loved ones or simply relaxing in nature's embrace. Whether you're seeking adventure or a peaceful retreat, Sawrey Forest offers a serene escape for everyone. Come explore the beauty and tranquility!

title: Oriental Sakura
desc: Oriental Sakura invites visitors to explore a romantic destination inspired by Japanese and Chinese cultures. Wander through gardens, relax in hot springs, visit the tea house, or join photo contests. Enjoy fantasy kitsune experiences, games, and various scenic getaways.

title: Forest Art Walk
desc: Embark on an artistic journey through the forest and discover magical, interesting, and perhaps even strange things. 3D works of art by some well-known and lesser-known artists are exhibited here. This destination also uses PBR-Materials & PBR-Light. The path is winding and you can discover something around every corner. modeled after the Deep Forest Art Land in Denmark. More information can be found at the landing point.

title: Bliss Gardens Park Spiritual Retreat
desc: Bliss Gardens Park, created by Luna Bliss, is a vast spiritual retreat encompassing both undersea and land areas, designed for reflection, relaxation and exploration. Areas were created for ceremonies and meditation, along with spaces for gathering with friends or enjoying fun rides. Meditative Mantras playing in the background add a special ambiance.

title: Dimrill Dale
desc: Dimrill Dale has Calas Galadhon's equestrian Coastal Trail Head, a Victorian Chapel with wedding animations, and the boho Grumpy Troll water-side bistro. Take horseback rides through woods, marshes, and mystical places. Water Horses are available or bring your own attachable one. One of the best trail rides in Second Life.

title: Dyfed Forest
desc: Dyfed Forest offers a serene escape into a misty woodland setting, bathed in the gentle hues of dusk. Visitors are welcomed by the soothing strains of quiet, relaxing music, inviting them to engage in Tai Chi, gather around a warm campfire, or simply enjoy the tranquil atmosphere. This GLBTQ+ friendly destination encourages camaraderie among guests, whether they choose to indulge in conversation or embrace the peaceful silence.

title: Le Grand Bleu
desc: Le Grand Bleu is a German destination where nature meets medieval charm, ideal for those in search of romance and adventure. Visitors can enjoy a balloon flight over stunning highlands and explore a grand castle that brings history to life.

title: Azure Haven
desc: Step back in time at Azure Haven, a serene 19th-century Mediterranean island. Wander through olive groves and lavender fields, or relax by the stone fountain. Discover the rustic fishing hut by the sea, and don't miss the dolphins playing in the waves. Add your images to the Flickr group: flic.kr/g/3fZsYL

title: Meadowlake
desc: Meadowlake is a complete wilderness with trails, buildings, natural landscapes, and lots to see and do. Hidden oases, meeting places, and activities are everywhere.

title: TNC - Else Cove
desc: Come set sail with The Nature Collective at their newest location, Else Cove. Located in beautiful Second Norway, off the Blake Sea, Else Cove is home to the new Come Sail Away event. Additional amenities and activities include; sailing, N-O fishing, games, kayaking, beach camping, clubhouse, boat slip rentals, and more! Come visit today, but don't forget your sunscreen!

title: Kuhflucht Wasserfaelle, Alpine Meadow
desc: Named after the real Kuhfluchtwasserfälle in Bavaria, Germany, these grand waterfalls cross the whole Alpine Meadow region in multiple steps till they meet the sea, 120 metres below! The cobbled roads wind around the stream, spanned by several bridges, making for great strolls or rides with impressive views of the alpine forests, countryside, and the ocean. Alpine Meadow is one of the regions of the CDS-Confederation of Democratic Simulators, a democratic community established in SL since 2004.

title: Ely's Garden
desc: At Ely's Garden in Salerio you will find twelve intimate waterfront locations surrounded by gardens, three grand gardens to admire and walk in peaceful nature alone or with friends, one playground, and a rezzer station for boats. It is an enchanting place near the Blake Sea. Take a walk in the gardens, relax, and have fun.

title: Ipperwash Cliffs National Seashore
desc: Ipperwash Cliffs National Sea Shore is a public park dedicated to the enjoyment and beautification of mainland SL. There are miles of roads and trails ideal for hiking and horseback riding and beautiful vistas for photography. Nearly two full regions of shores, cliffs, forests, and meadows to explore.

title: Wild Branch Brewing Co
desc: Established in 2021, Wild Branch Brewing is a craft beer brewery tucked away amidst nature's beauty. Enjoy the pub, picturesque landscape, fishing, live music, games, and so much more!

title: Whimsy
desc: Whimsy has been enchanting visitors since 2008. One of Second Life's most interactive regions, guests are able to trigger the volcano Pele, drive the train, hang glide, canoe, skydive, swim, dance, play games, or just relax in a lush tropical setting while listening to modern Hawaiian music. Fun, beautiful, exciting, and wickedly funny, Whimsy is for everyone!

title: The Hamptons
desc: The Hamptons is a beautiful, relaxing retreat for everyone to enjoy. Gorgeous photogenic scenes of nature can be experienced and explored, which were inspired by Northern East Coast and Western European landscapes. This lovely destination has plenty of hideaways to cuddle, relax, and get away from from the crowd and the noise.
